## Checklist

- [ ] `make test-short` passes (and `make test` if it touches transfer/remotes)
- [ ] No change to serialized artifacts (`.dvc`, `.dir`, cache/remote layout) — or the oracle test still passes
- [ ] User-facing output is in English
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
